query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: An elevated nighttime view of an urban street lined with parked cars and vans, illuminated by tall streetlamps emitting a strong yellow-orange glow. A dark multi-story brick building with illuminated windows occupies the left foreground, while a small glass-roofed structure and rows of bicycles sit on the sidewalk in the middle distance. Industrial construction cranes are visible against a fog-covered sky in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An elevated nighttime view of a fog-shrouded urban street bathed in a sickly sodium-vapor yellow-orange cast from tall streetlamps. Parked cars and vans line the road beside a dark multi-story brick building with warmly lit windows. A glass-roofed sidewalk structure and rows of bicycles emerge from the haze in the middle ground, while industrial construction cranes loom faintly in the obscured background. The pervasive unnatural tint and heavy mist evoke atmospheric distress, creating an oppressive mood of unease and melancholy.
